title: Delivery Tags, Acknowledgements, and Redelivery · Execution Trace: Redelivered Evidence Limit

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Predict Redelivered Evidence Limit · Theory Redelivered Evidence Limit
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory Go messaging team handles case 3686 during confirm-window load test with broker flow control. Build deterministic Go evidence to enforce same-generation exactly-one terminal delivery decision after durable effect; separate deterministic browser proof from race-enabled and live-broker evidence; then close the owning channel before one delivery decision. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.
